constants.description: Default balanced same-family relief rho for H_notated_fusion_potential (mirrors SAME_FAMILY_RELIEF_PROFILES["balanced"] in services/constants.py).
constants.page_reference: N/A (project-calibrated symbolic parameter; see docs/archive_legacy/model_audit/H_NOTATED_FUSION_POTENTIAL_JUSTIFICATION.md)
constants.rationale: Acoustic and orchestration literature motivates treating register proximity, spectral relatedness, and blend as distinct from raw score layout alone; the numeric 0.55 is literature-motivated but project-calibrated, not measured on audio in this codebase.
